'''''Defender''''' was a [[Bakura-class destroyer|''Bakura''-class destroyer]] in the [[Bakuran Defense Fleet]].

==History==
Like the rest of the Fleet, it was loaned to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] in [[18 ABY/Legends|18 ABY]] during the [[Corellian Crisis]]. The ''Defender'', along with its sister ship [[Sentinel (Bakura-class)|''Sentinel'']], was one of the few [[Bakura/Legends|Bakuran]] ships to survive the subsequent [[Battle of Centerpoint Station (Corellian Crisis)|Battle of Centerpoint Station]]. She later fought in the [[Battle of Bakura (28 ABY)|battle of Bakura]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Assault at Selonia]]''
*''[[Showdown at Centerpoint]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]''
